title: Annapurneshwari Temple, Cherukunnu
tagline: Annapurneshwari Temple, Cherukunnu — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Annapoorneshwari Temple is a Hindu temple in Kannur, Kerala.
overview.description: Annapoorneshwari Temple is a Hindu temple in Kannur, Kerala. The deity is worshipped as Annapurneshwari (Annapurna), the goddess of food.

topPlaces.name: Cherukunnu
topPlaces.description: Cherukunnu is a census town in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Cherukunnu town is located on the Valapattanam-Pappinisseri-Pazhayangadi main road, situated to the south of Pazhayangadi in Kannur District in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Madayipara
topPlaces.description: Madayipara is a flat-topped hillock located in the Madayi, of Kannur district of Kerala state in the Southern India. It overlooks the town of Payangadi on the northern bank of Kuppam River.

topPlaces.name: Kannapuram
topPlaces.description: Kannapuram is a census town and grama panchayat in Kannur district of North Malabar region in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Matool
topPlaces.description: Matool (also Mattul) is a village in Kannur Municipal Corporation of Kerala, India. It is located 19 kilometres (12 mi) north of Kannur city.

topPlaces.name: Malabar Coast
topPlaces.description: The Malabar Coast (Malayalam: [mɐlɐbaːr]) is the southwestern region of the Indian subcontinent. It generally refers to the western coastline of India stretching from Konkan to Kanyakumari.

topPlaces.name: Morazha
topPlaces.description: Morazha is a village of Anthoor Municipality in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Before formation of Anthoor Municipality this village was part of Thaliparamba Municipality.

topPlaces.name: Ezhome
topPlaces.description: Ezhome is a census town in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Annapurneshwari Temple, Cherukunnu?
faq.a: The best time to visit Annapurneshwari Temple, Cherukunnu is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Annapurneshwari Temple, Cherukunnu?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (117 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (109 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Annapurneshwari Temple, Cherukunnu?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Annapurneshwari Temple, Cherukunnu at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Annapurneshwari Temple, Cherukunnu?
faq.a: Stays in Annapurneshwari Temple, Cherukunnu start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Annapurneshwari Temple, Cherukunnu?
faq.a: The top attractions are Cherukunnu, Madayipara, Madayi, Kannapuram, Matool.
